cards.name: summarized
cards.commentaire: With 5 model series, display the reasoning if it is active. By default, "omited" hides the reasoning.

cards.name: transparent background
cards.commentaire: Enable a transparent background when generating an image (only with gtp-image-1.5.)

cards.name: image high quality
cards.commentaire: Provide the images in high quality

cards.name: full size
cards.commentaire: Provide the image in full size

cards.name: portrait orientation
cards.commentaire: Provide the images in portrait orientation (1:3).

cards.name: landscape orientation
cards.commentaire: Provide the images in landscape orientation (3:1).
